release_channels.description: Deterministic mock release channel for dry-run and governance rehearsal builds.

stability.rationale: Release identity channel semantics remain provisional until release manifest generation and packaging policy are frozen.
stability.replacement_target: Replace RELEASE-0 channel stubs with release-pinned channel and distribution policy contracts.
